skills.name: Summoning
skills.description: Summon the devil of the card inserted in Grimore.
skills.effect_text:
Attack Transfer Rate: CaptionRatio3 %
Physical/Magic Defense Transfer Rate: CaptionRatio %
Maximum HP Transfer Rate: CaptionRatio2 %
Duration: 30 minutes

skills.name: Riding
skills.description: Ride the summoned devil from the Grimore and take control of it.
skills.effect_text:
Enables use of the devil's skills
Damage reduction while riding: CaptionRatio %

skills.name: Morph
skills.description: Mutates the summoned devil from the Grimoire to the devil that is equipped as a secondary card in the Grimoire while maintaining its previous stats.
skills.effect_text: Transform to another Devil-type boss that is added to the Grimoire

skills.name: Summon Familiar
skills.description: Summon a familiar. The familiar rushes to the enemy that attacks you or you attack, and then explodes itself.
skills.effect_text:
Skill factor: SkillFactor %
Summon 5 Familiar
Duration: 60 seconds

skills.name: Summon Salamion
skills.description: Summon the fire devil Salamion. Salamion follows its master and attacks enemies.
skills.effect_text:
Attack Transfer Rate: CaptionRatio %
Physical/Magic Defense Transfer Rate: CaptionRatio2 %
Maximum HP Transfer Rate: CaptionRatio3 %
Duration: 30 minutes

skills.name: Summon Servant
skills.description: Summon a servant. The servant will grant beneficial effects while following its master. The number of buffs increases proportionally to the level of [Summon Servant].
skills.effect_text:
CaptionRatio Applies up to
1st effect  [AoE Attack Ratio increases]
- [Skill Level] increases
2nd effect [SP Recovery time decreases]
- 18 + [Skill Level] x 3% Decrease
3rd effect [Stamina Recovery]
- Recover [Skill Level]/10 every 1.5 seconds
4th effect [Magic Defense increases]
- [Skill Level] x 10
5th effect [Additional Damage increase]
- [Skill Level] x 400 + 1.5 x [SPR] increase

skills.name: Evocation
skills.description: Summons the demon from the secondary card equipped on the Grimore. The damage dealt is increased a maximum of 100% in proportion to the caster's SPR. The Evocation buff is applied to the demon created by Summoning when damage is dealt with Evocation. Under Evocation buff, ignores 10% of Physical Defense and Magic Defense of enemy.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor SkillFactor % x 2 times
Evocation Buff Duration CaptionRatio2 seconds

skills.name: Desmodus
skills.description: Summon and release blood-sucking bats to attack enemies. Bat attacks inflict Desmodus Blood Sucking debuff.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
Increases Summon Damage by CaptionRatio %
[Blood Sucking]Duration: 20 seconds

attributes.name: Summon Familar: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Summon Familiar] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Summon Familar: Splash
attributes.description:
* Deals damage to nearby enemies with a 5% chance per attribute level when the summoned familiar of [Summon Familiar] explodes itself

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: Sorcerer: SP Recovery
attributes.description: * Increases character's SP recovery by 1 per attribute level

attributes.name: Summon Salamion: Ignite
attributes.description:
* Chance to inflict [Burn] for 10 seconds on an enemy when attacked by Salamion

* Chance increases by 2% per attribute level

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: Summon Salamion: Blind
attributes.description:
* Chance to afflict [Blind] for 10 seconds on an enemy when attacked by Salamion

* Chance increases by 2% per attribute level

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: Evocation: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Evocation] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Summon Servant: Quick Order
attributes.description:
* Summoned servant grants beneficial effects at a higher rate

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: Desmodus: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Desmodus] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Riding: Increase Stats
attributes.description: * Increases damage dealt with Mounted demon by 0.5% per attribute level

attributes.name: Summon Salamion: Heat
attributes.description:
* Salamion restores the HP of itself and nearby summons every 20 sec

* Recovery cycle shortened by 1 sec per attribute level

attributes.name: Summoning: Overwork
attributes.description:
* Increases the damage dealt by demons summoned through [Summoning] or [Morph] by 3% per attribute level, but reduces the demon's HP by 3% every 10 seconds

* Consumes the caster's SP by [40 + (character level x 0.75)] every 10 seconds

attributes.name: Summoning: Overwork
attributes.description:
* Increases the damage dealt by demons summoned through [Summoning] or [Morph] by 3% per attribute level, but reduces the demon's HP by 3% every 10 seconds

* Consumes the caster's SP by [40 + (character level x 0.75)] every 10 seconds

attributes.name: [Arts] Summoning: Self
attributes.description:
* Cannot mount summoned Grimoire but all Grimoire skills will be used automatically

* Affected by the attribute Mount: Increased Stats

attributes.name: [Arts] Summon Familiar: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Summon Familiar] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Evocation: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Evocation] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Desmodus: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Desmodus] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: Desmodus: AoE
attributes.description: * Increases the range of Desmodus but reduces its skill damage by 30%

attributes.name: [Arts] Desmodus: Formation
attributes.description:
* No damage apply to the enemy by the Desmodus skill

* Increases skill range by 50%

* Target: 20

* Final increase in Blood Sucking debuff efficiency by 5%
